seoTitle: Bunya vs Bunya Mountains — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Bunya and Bunya Mountains. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Bunya vs Bunya Mountains: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Bunya and Bunya Mountains.
heading: Bunya vs Bunya Mountains — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Bunya, Queensland and Bunya Mountains, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Bunya has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Bunya Mountains (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Bunya or Bunya Mountains safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Bunya has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Bunya Mountains scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Bunya scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Bunya Mountains scores 58/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Bunya or Bunya Mountains?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Bunya has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
